prompt: I'm researching RASopathies — show me all disorders in DisMech that involve the RAS/MAPK pathway and summarize what they share mechanistically.

assertions.text: Names at least 3 specific RASopathy disorders (e.g., Noonan syndrome, LEOPARD syndrome, Costello syndrome, CFC syndrome, Legius syndrome, Neurofibromatosis type 1)
assertions.description: The response identifies at least 3 named RASopathy disorders

assertions.text: Describes MAPK or RAS signaling as the shared mechanism
assertions.description: The response correctly identifies RAS/MAPK pathway dysregulation as the mechanistic thread shared across RASopathies

assertions.text: Lists specific causative genes for at least 2 different disorders (e.g., PTPN11 for Noonan, HRAS for Costello, BRAF for CFC, NF1 for NF1)
assertions.description: The response provides gene-disorder mapping for at least 2 RASopathies

assertions.text: With-skill response names DisMech-sourced disorders; without-skill gives a generic textbook summary
assertions.description: The with-skill response is grounded in actual DisMech records vs. generic biomedical knowledge
